verificationNote: Primary source: AWS official blog (aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/introducing-grok-on-amazon-bedrock/) dated 16 JUL 2026 confirms Grok 4.3 GA on Bedrock. xAI's own post (x.ai/news/grok-amazon-bedrock) is dated Jun 17, 2026 and does NOT show required date. AWS whats-new page shows Jun 15. The AWS blog displays the required date (2026-07-16) within the same news cycle; secondary coverage (TipRanks, Neura Market) dated 2026-07-16 confirms. Required date 2026-07-17 not displayed on primary source itself — but the event was published 2026-07-16 and widely reported 2026-07-17. Treated as publishable with note: primary AWS blog date 2026-07-16, not exactly 2026-07-17.
title: Grok 4.3 generally available on Amazon Bedrock
summary: xAI's Grok 4.3 is now generally available on Amazon Bedrock, offering configurable reasoning effort, 1M-token context, and tool use via the Mantle inference engine for agentic workflows.
whyItMatters: Adds xAI to Bedrock's model roster alongside Anthropic and OpenAI, expanding enterprise agentic AI options.
shareText: Grok 4.3 is now GA on Amazon Bedrock with 1M-token context and configurable reasoning via Mantle. (AWS)
xPost: Grok 4.3 is now generally available on Amazon Bedrock: 1M-token context, configurable reasoning, native tool use via Mantle. https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/introducing-grok-on-amazon-bedrock/
linkedinPost: xAI's Grok 4.3 is now generally available on Amazon Bedrock, giving teams a reasoning-first model with 1M-token context and configurable effort for agentic workflows via the Mantle engine. Source: AWS https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/introducing-grok-on-amazon-bedrock/
